zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Hammond於1661年12月30日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼艾可格盧斯特時，她的父親John Hammond26歲，母親Mary Somes19歲。她於1679年7月24日與John Maxfield在美國麻薩諸塞州艾可格盧斯特結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她於1661年住在美國麻薩諸塞州。她去世於1709年在美國新罕布夏州葛拉芙頓皮爾蒙特享年48歲，埋葬在美國麻薩諸塞州艾可格盧斯特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Hammond于1661年12月30日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼艾可格盧斯特时，她的父亲John Hammond26岁，母亲Mary Somes19岁。她于1679年7月24日与John Maxfield在美国马萨诸塞州艾可格盧斯特结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她于1661年住在美国马萨诸塞州。她去世于1709年在美国新罕布什尔州葛拉芙頓皮爾蒙特享年48岁，埋葬在美国马萨诸塞州艾可格盧斯特。

nameMeanings.name: Hammond
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): from the Middle English, Old French personal name Ha(i)mon, the oblique case form of the ancient Germanic Ha(i)mo, a short form of various compound names beginning with haim ‘home’. It frequently developed excrescent -d, giving Hamond, Haimund, and Hawmond. Alternatively, the name could derive from the Middle English personal name Hamund (Old Norse Hámundr, composed of the elements hár ‘high’ + mund ‘protection’), which may have been used in Normandy and in 12th-century eastern England, but the former explanation is more likely. The surname was sometimes confused with Almond and Ammon .

English: in the Bradford area of Yorkshire, the name is a shortened form of Ormondroyd, formerly Hamondesrode, from a lost place in Birstall (Yorkshire), named with the Middle English (Old French) personal name Hamon (1 above) + Middle English roid, a southern Yorkshire pronunciation of Old English rod ‘clearing’.
Irish: generally an importation from England, but occasionally an adopted name for Mac Ámoinn, see McCammon .

variants.name: Hammonds
meanings: English (Shropshire and Staffordshire): variant of Hammond , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Almond
meanings: English:
from the Middle English personal name Almund, in which Old English Æthelmund ‘noble protector’ and Ealhmund ‘temple protector’ have coalesced.
variant of   Allman   and   Allmand   both meaning ‘German’, assimilated by folk etymology to the vocabulary word denoting the tree.

variants.name: Hammett
meanings: English (southwestern England, especialy Devon): from the Middle English personal name Hamet, a pet form of ancient Germanic Hamo (see Hammond 1).

variants.name: Hamon
meanings: Breton, French, and English (Channel Islands): from the Breton, Old French, Middle English personal name Hamon, the oblique case form of the ancient Germanic Ha(i)mo, a short form of various compound names beginning with haim ‘home’. See also Hammond .

variants.name: Hamlin
meanings: English and Irish: of Norman origin, from the Norman French and Middle English personal name Hamelin, a double diminutive of Hamo (see Hammond ).
French: variant of   Hamelin   and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this.
Americanized form of Finnish Hämäläinen (see Hamalainen ).

variants.name: Hampson
meanings: English (mainly Lancashire): patronymic from the Norman personal name Hamo, Hamon (see Hammond ).
Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hAmhsaigh ‘descendant of Amhsach’ a byname meaning ‘mercenary soldier’ or ‘messenger’, from the adjective amhasach ‘aggressive’.

variants.name: Haimes
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Yacov, Yosef.

English: variant, with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s, of Haime, of Norman origin, from the Old French personal name Haim (ancient Germanic Haimo, from haim- ‘home’), often Latinized as Hamo. Compare Hammond .
Americanized form of some similar (like-sounding) Jewish surname.

variants.name: Hammon
meanings: English (Middlesex and Ken): variant of   Hammond  .

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Hammond was born on 30 December 1661, in Gloucester, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, her father, John Hammond, was 26 and her mother, Mary Somes, was 19. She married John Maxfield on 24 July 1679, in Gloucester, Essex, Massachusetts, United States. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 3 daughters. She lived in Massachusetts, United States in 1661. She died in 1709, in Piermont, Grafton, New Hampshire, United States, at the age of 48, and was buried in Gloucester, Essex, Massachusetts, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Hammond est née le 30 décembre 1661, à Gloucester, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, John Hammond, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Mary Somes, avait 19 ans. Elle a épousé John Maxfield le 24 juillet 1679, à Gloucester, Essex, Massachusetts, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles. Elle a vécu à Massachusetts, États-Unis en 1661. Elle est décédée en 1709, à Piermont, Grafton, New Hampshire, États-Unis, à l’âge de 48 ans, et a été enterrée à Gloucester, Essex, Massachusetts, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Hammond am 30. Dezember 1661 in Gloucester, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Hammond 26 und ihre Mutter Mary Somes 19. Sie hat am 24. Juli 1679 in Gloucester, Essex, Massachusetts, Vereinigte Staaten John Maxfield geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 3 Töchter. 1661 hat sie in Massachusetts, Vereinigte Staaten gelebt. Sie starb 1709 im Alter von 48 Jahren in Piermont, Grafton, New Hampshire, Vereinigte Staaten und wurde in Gloucester, Essex, Massachusetts, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Hammond è nata il il 30 dicembre 1661 nel Gloucester, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, sua padre, John Hammond, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Mary Somes, aveva 19 anni. Lei sposato John Maxfield il 24 luglio 1679, nel Gloucester, Essex, Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 3 figlie. Vissuto a Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America nel 1661. Morì nel 1709, nel Piermont, Grafton, New Hampshire, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 48 anni, e fu sepolta a Gloucester, Essex, Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Hammondが1661年12月30日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーエセックスグロウセスターで生まれた時，父John Hammondは26歳，母Mary Somesは19歳であった。1679年7月24日にアメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州エセックスグロウセスターでJohn Maxfieldと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1661年にはアメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州に住んでいた。彼女は1709年にアメリカ合衆国ニューハンプシャー州グラフトンピエルモントで48歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州エセックスグロウセスターにて埋葬された。

ko.Gloucester, Essex, Massachusetts Bay, Br: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 에세스 그루스스터
ko.Gloucester, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Col: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 에세스 그루스스터
ko.Salisbury, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colo: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 에세스 살리스버이
ko.Salisbury, Norfolk, Massachusetts Bay Co: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 노르폴크 살리스버이
ko.Essex, Massachusetts Bay, British Coloni: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 에세스
ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Hammond(이)가 1661년 12월 30일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 에세스 그루스스터에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Hammond(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mary Somes(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 1679년 7월 24일 미국 매사추세츠 주 에세스 그루스스터에서 John Maxfield(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 1661년도에 미국 매사추세츠 주에서 살았다. 그녀는 1709년 미국 뉴햄프셔 주 그라프턴 피몽에서 48세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 매사추세츠 주 에세스 그루스스터에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Hammond nasceu em 30 de dezembro de 1661, em Gloucester, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, seu pai, John Hammond, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Mary Somes, tinha 19 anos. Ela casou-se com John Maxfield em 24 de julho de 1679, em Gloucester, Essex, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela viveu em Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América em 1661. Ela faleceu em 1709, em Piermont, Grafton, Nova Hampshire, Estados Unidos da América, com 48 anos, e foi sepultada em Gloucester, Essex, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Hammond родилась 30 декабря 1661 г. в местности глоусестир, эссекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика, её отцу по имени John Hammond было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary Somes, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Maxfield 24 июля 1679 г. в местности глоусестир, эссекс, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она жила в местности Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты в 1661 году. Она умерла в 1709 г. в местности пьирмонт, графтон, Нью-Гэмпшир, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 48 лет и была похоронена в местности глоусестир, эссекс, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Hammond nació el 30 de diciembre de 1661, en Gloucester, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, su papá, John Hammond, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Mary Somes, tenía 19 años. Se casó con John Maxfield el 24 de julio de 1679, en Gloucester, Essex, Masachusets, Estados Unidos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 3 hijas. Vivió en Masachusets, Estados Unidos en 1661. Murió en 1709, en Piermont, Grafton, Nuevo Hampshire, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 48 años, y fue sepultada en Gloucester, Essex, Masachusets, Estados Unidos.
